name: Summer-Intern-Final-Project-NETSEC
description: Enterprise-grade network security infrastructure designed during NTI training program. Capabilities: Multi-area secure network design, VPNs, Zone-Based Firewalls, ACLs, Routing Protocols (OSPF, RIP). Impact: Defense-in-depth for multi-site corporate network.

name: Vole-Machine
description: Custom virtual machine implementation built from scratch in C++. Capabilities: Memory Management, Custom Instruction Set, CPU Simulation.

name: CS341-A3-CPU-Scheduler
description: Multi-algorithm CPU scheduler simulator. Algorithms: FCFS, SJF, Round Robin, Priority. Features: performance benchmarking, Gantt chart visualization, turnaround time analysis.

name: CS341-A1-Command-Line-Interpreter
description: Unix-like shell interpreter in Java. Capabilities: process control, I/O redirection, pipes, command parsing.

name: CS251-Asset-Management-Zakat-Calculation-System
description: Full-stack financial management system with Islamic finance (zakat) calculation engine. Features: asset tracking, automated zakat calculation, multi-user support.
